title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.600 - Any municipality authorized to prepare a master plan for physical development of community
text:
100.600.  Any municipality authorized to prepare a master plan for physical development of community. — The governing body of any municipality, which is not otherwise authorized to establish a planning agency with power to prepare a master plan for the physical development of the community, is hereby authorized and empowered to prepare such a master plan for the purposes of initiating and carrying out a project under this law.
(L. 1967 p. 172 § 31)
